title: 伯诺瓦
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"0.36377713262160137","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1920/h_1080/50364/842288/2026/1/11/633897.jpg"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_307/h_467/50364/842288/2026/1/11/568239.jpg"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.789fde19d2ffa","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伯诺瓦"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者伯诺瓦，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"隶属于E.0.S.安全防务署第三特别行动小组，受现任署长伦芙纳直接管辖。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在安全防务署的特工训练基地中，伯诺瓦通过了严苛的训练，并受当时的副署长伦芙纳直接调配，加入了安全防务署的第三特别行动小组。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伯诺瓦心思缜密，他行动低调，极少表现自己，但也总是在默默地观察一切，会抓住一切机会，为自己和同伴在行动中保留退路。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他是藏身在隐秘之处的猎手，也是最可靠的影子搭档。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"身为安全防务署的特别行动干员，鲜少有人知晓伯诺瓦的隐私，更无人能真正摸清他的行踪，他会隐蔽地盯住一切目标，是安全防务署隐忍观察着一切的「影隼」。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SSR"}]}]}},{"key":"
